title: Microsoft Teams Widget Integration
excerpt: My company uses MS Teams extensively for file storage, communication, and sharing. Our monday.com user base includes a limited number of members and a large number of guests. When attempting to add the monday.com widget …

posts.author: andrew6803 (Andrew Jenkins)
posts.cookedHtml: My company uses MS Teams extensively for file storage, communication, and sharing. Our monday.com user base includes a limited number of members and a large number of guests. When attempting to add the monday.com widget to the Teams layout (my subject, client, etc), the widget only works for members and will not allow use by guests. In response, we have added monday.com as a website in the layout, but if a widget has been created by monday.com for Teams, I would expect it to work with all cohorts.
